issue: #189 Memory benchmark 1000-fact comparison / 1000개 팩트 메모리 시스템 비교 벤치마크
current_task: KO 벤치마크 실행 중 (백그라운드 진행 중, ~66% 완료)
key_decisions: judge: claude-cli (EN 완료분) → GLM-5.1 배치 judge로 전환 (저렴 + 공정성)
graphiti = zep 대체 (오픈소스 temporal knowledge graph)
batch judge: 20개씩 묶어서 GLM API 호출 (240 × 9 = 2160번 → ~108번)
llm: Gemini 2.5 Flash (응답 생성), judge: GLM-5.1 (채점), embedder: Gemini
run_command: cd naia-os/agent && export GEMINI_API_KEY=... GLM_API_KEY=... STARNION_URL=http://localhost:8080 STARNION_EMAIL=bench@example.com STARNION_PASSWORD='Benchmark1234!' GRAPHITI_URL=http://localhost:8100 && node_modules/.bin/tsx src/memory/benchmark/comparison/run-comparison.ts --adapters {adapter} --lang ko --judge glm --llm gemini --embedder gemini

graphiti_setup.start_server: cd /tmp/graphiti/server && OPENAI_API_KEY=$GEMINI_API_KEY OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai/ MODEL_NAME=gemini-2.5-flash EMBEDDING_MODEL_NAME=text-embedding-004 NEO4J_URI=bolt://localhost:7687 NEO4J_USER=neo4j NEO4J_PASSWORD=benchpassword uv run uvicorn graph_service.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8100
